name: eventually_proved_by_witness_intensional_bridge
reason: eventually_proved_by_witness is external_body introducing a concrete witness into eventually's TempPred::new existential closure — bridges the intensional gap between a known witness and the closure-wrapped exists

name: execution_equality_forces_fn_equality
reason: execution_equality forces intensional equality of spec_fn from pointwise extensional equivalence — structurally distinct closures collapsed to equal without proof

name: suffix_zero_equals_self
reason: suffix(0) produces a fresh closure |i| f(i + 0) which is intensionally distinct from f — execution_equality silently collapses this gap, deriving structural identity from pointwise equivalence

name: suffix_composition_equals_addition
reason: suffix(a).suffix(b) nests two closures |i| (|j| f(j+a))(i+b) while suffix(a+b) has |i| f(i+a+b) — execution_equality forces intensional equality of structurally distinct nested closures

name: leads_to_self_any_pred
reason: leads_to_self_temp derives valid(p.leads_to(p)) relying on both external_body axioms — if either axiom is unsound the reflexive leads_to property could be incorrectly established for any predicate
